overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage of walking through a dark, narrow mountain canyon at night. The player character uses a flashlight to illuminate the dirt path ahead while navigating between rocky cliffs under a starry sky, approaching a distant light source.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon, flashlight illuminating the dirt path ahead between rocky walls

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall rising immediately to the left of the path
steep rocky canyon wall rising immediately to the right of the path
uneven dirt trail winding through the canyon floor
dark night sky with visible stars visible between the canyon walls
sparse bushes and grass along the right canyon wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow, enclosed canyon at night. Flashlight illumination reveals the rough dirt path between steep rocky cliffs on both sides. The sky is visible overhead with stars, and sparse vegetation lines the right wall. No other characters or significant events occur.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon trail approaching distant settlement light

events.description: distant light source becomes visible at the end of the canyon path ahead
player character's arm briefly enters frame from the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path toward the newly visible distant light, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: faint blue-white light source visible in the distance at the end of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the canyon as the path slightly opens. A distant light becomes visible ahead, suggesting a settlement or camp. The vegetation on the right side becomes more prominent and closer to the path. The player's arm briefly enters the frame from the left, and the flashlight continues to illuminate the uneven terrain ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic mountain canyon that gradually opens toward a distant light source. It begins with a walk along a rough dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the night to reveal steep, rocky cliffs under a starry sky. As the camera advances, the narrow passage begins to widen and the sparse vegetation along the right wall becomes more prominent and closer to the path. The scene then shifts as a faint light appears in the distance, suggesting a settlement ahead, while the player's arm briefly enters the frame from the left. The movement concludes with the flashlight continuing to illuminate the uneven terrain as the path leads further toward the glowing horizon.
